name: WP Internal Link Optimization API
description: Analyze WordPress article content and get intelligent internal link suggestions with anchor text, relevance scores, and insert positions. Supports sitemap parsing.
long_description:
## Overview WordPress Internal Link Optimization API that analyzes your article content and returns intelligent link suggestions with anchor text, relevance scores, and precise insert positions. Supports sitemap parsing and both English and Japanese content. Built on Cloudflare Workers. ## Key Features - ✅ Relevance-scored link suggestions using unigram/bigram/trigram matching - ✅ Recommended anchor text extracted from article content - ✅ Character-level insert positions for precise link placement - ✅ Duplicate link detection to avoid over-linking - ✅ Sitemap URL parsing and manual page list support ## Use Cases - **WordPress Bloggers**: Improve internal linking for better SEO and user flow - **SEO Agencies**: Automate internal link audits across client sites - **Content Teams**: Suggest relevant links as editors review articles - **CMS Automation**: Auto-insert internal links during content publishing pipelines - **Multilingual Sites**: Works with both English and Japanese content ## Quick Start ``` POST /analyze Content-Type: application/json {"article_html": "

Your article HTML...

", "sitemap_url": "https://example.com/sitemap.xml"} ``` Returns ranked suggestions with `url`, `anchor_text`, `relevance_score`, `insert_position`, and `matching_keywords`. ## Pricing | Plan | Price | Requests/mo | Rate Limit | |------|-------|-------------|------------| | **Basic (FREE)** | $0 | 100 | 1/sec | | Pro | $9.99 | 1,000 | 5/sec | | Ultra | $29.99 | 10,000 | 20/sec | Free tier includes all analysis features. No credit card required.

endpoints.name: Analyze Internal Links
endpoints.description: Analyze article HTML against sitemap or page list and return ranked link suggestions

parameters.name: article_html
parameters.description: HTML content of the article to analyze

parameters.name: sitemap_url
parameters.description: URL of XML sitemap (alternative to pages)

parameters.name: pages
parameters.description: Array of {url, title, content} objects (alternative to sitemap_url)

endpoints.name: Suggest Keyword Links
endpoints.description: Match article keywords to existing page URLs

parameters.name: article_text
parameters.description: Plain text content of the article

endpoints.name: Health Check
endpoints.description: Check if the API is running

endpoints.name: API Info
endpoints.description: Get API information and available endpoints
